buildCommand: cd ../.. && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate && pnpm install && pnpm --filter="@onboarding.jazz/shared-schemas" build && pnpm --filter @onboarding.jazz/profile-app build && cp -r packages/profile-app/dist/* packages/profile-app/public/
installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate && pnpm install
